title: bourreria angustifolia
intro: Bourreria angustifolia, also known as the narrowleaf bourreria or borreira, is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves, bark, and roots have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, offering benefits such as pain relief, improved digestion, and immune system support. Bourreria angustifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in folk medicine in certain regions of South America and the Caribbean.
